scripts.build: bun run --cwd client build && bun run --cwd server build
scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently "bun run dev:server" "bun run --cwd client build && bun scripts/prepare-desktop-assets.mjs && neu run"
scripts.desktop:build: bun run --cwd client build && bun scripts/prepare-desktop-assets.mjs && neu build && bun scripts/package-desktop-server.mjs
